title: Moskva (disambiguation) - Wikipedia
body: Look up Moskva in Wiktionary, the free dictionary. Moskva is a transliteration of " Москва ", meaning Moscow in the Russian language. Moskva may also refer to: Places [ edit ] Moskva (inhabited locality) , several rural localities in Russia Moskva (river) , central-Russian river on which Moscow lies 787 Moskva , a Main Belt asteroid Moskva (Almaty Metro) , a railway station in Almaty, Kazakhstan Ships [ edit ] Soviet helicopter carrier Moskva Moskva -class helicopter carrier Russian cruiser Moskva , a Slava class guided missile cruiser, formerly Slava , sunk during the 2022 Russian invasion of Ukraine Moskva (1959 icebreaker) , a diesel-electric icebreaker in service in 1960–1992 Moskva (2007 icebreaker) , a diesel-electric icebreaker in service since 2008 Moskva class , several ship classes Moskva (ship) , a list of ships named Moskva Other uses [ edit ] Moskva, a medium-format camera made by Krasnogorsky Zavod Moskva, a ZX Spectrum computer clone Moskva, another name for the 81-765 series and the 81-775 series of metro cars on the Moscow Metro Moskva (album) , by Russian pop group Glukoza Moskva (magazine) , a Russian literary magazine See also [ edit ] Search for "Moskva" on Wikipedia. The dictionary definition of Москва at Wiktionary Hotel Moskva (disambiguation) All pages with titles beginning with Moskva All pages with titles containing Moskva Moscow (disambiguation) Moskovsky (disambiguation) Moskwa (surname) Topics referred to by the same term This disambiguation page lists articles associated with the title Moskva .
